role.name: XIS Server (with DocumentManifest support)
role.description: XIS (DVA) in MedMij context, for servers that support the DocumentManifest resource.

role-NoManifest.name: XIS Server (without DocumentManifest support)
role-NoManifest.description: XIS (DVA) in MedMij context, for servers that don't support the DocumentManifest resource. These scripts test if a request on the DocumentManifest resource is gracefully handled.
